## Trade Recommendations

**1. Best CSP:**
PLTR $120 strike, 2026-06-18, 40 DTE, $3.00/$3.15, delta 0.22, 23.4% annualized return

**2. Best CC (Position Income):**
NVDA $230 strike, 2026-06-18, 40 DTE, $7.85/$8.00, delta 0.38, 33.3% annualized return

**3. Best LEAPS:**
None qualify - all have elevated IVP (64-91%) or extended above MA50

**4. Best Bull Call Spread:**
None available

**5. IVP Environment:**
Mixed volatility - growth names like PLTR (59% IVP) offering excellent CSP opportunities while mega-caps remain overpriced for LEAPS purchases
